div.head: CH–22. Editorial Note
div.p: On May 20, 1959, representatives of the United States and Chile signed in Washington an agreement providing for the Development Loan Fund to lend $300,000 to Chile to finance design engineering for a new international jet airport at Pudahuel. Documentation concerning the loan is in ARA/WST Files, Lot 62 D 31, “DLF.” For additional information, see Department of State Bulletin, June 1, 1959, p. 834.
